name: Universal Valve Lockout Device
shortDescription: Bottom-jaw-grip lockout with interchangeable arms for irregular valve handles.
longDescription: A lower bottom-jaw grip locks onto valve stems that don't match a standard gate, ball or butterfly lockout, with interchangeable long and short arms sold separately so one base device covers a wider range of handle shapes and reaches. An insulated-cable version is also available for valves in tight or hazardous locations.

images.alt: Universal Valve Lockout Device supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara

specs.label: Arms
specs.value: Long arm / short arm (interchangeable, sold separately)
